description: Create the landing page at /for/logistics - a conversion-oriented product page that sells the Landed Cost Report as a result, not a tool. Also add a homepage card linking to it.
steps: Create app/for/logistics/page.tsx as a server component page with Metadata export. SEO metadata: title 'Landed Cost Calculator for US Importers | CostSmart', description targeting US small businesses importing goods. Canonical URL: CANONICAL_DOMAIN + '/for/logistics'.

Implement Hero section: Dark background (matching homepage hero style bg-[#0A0F1E]), headline 'Know Your Exact Landed Cost Before You Ship', subhead 'The only free tool that calculates your total import cost - duties, shipping, route distance, and last-mile delivery - in one report.' A prominent CTA button 'Get Your Landed Cost Report' that scrolls to the calculator section. Use the emerald accent color for CTAs.

Implement Problem Statement section: white background, text like 'Most importers discover hidden costs AFTER the shipment arrives. Customs surprises, unexpected freight charges, last-mile fees you never budgeted for. Stop guessing your margins.'

Implement How It Works section: 3 steps with numbered icons: (1) Enter shipment details - origin, destination, product info, (2) We calculate everything - duties, taxes, freight, domestic delivery, (3) Get your complete report - total landed cost with full breakdown

Implement 'What is Included in Your Report' feature grid: 6 items in a 2x3 or 3x2 grid using Card components. Items: Import Duty & Customs Fees, Freight/Shipping Estimate, Route Distance & Transit Time (badge: 'Google Routes API'), Last-Mile Delivery Estimate, Total Landed Cost Breakdown, Tax Summary (GST/VAT/Sales tax). Each card has an icon from lucide-react and short description.

Implement Free vs Pro comparison section: two columns or side-by-side cards. Free: Basic landed cost estimate, 3 reports/day, Email delivery. Pro: Full detailed PDF report, Unlimited calculations, Route optimization, Historical rate tracking. Use checkmarks and X marks. Pro column has a 'Upgrade to Pro' CTA linking to /pricing.

Implement Social Proof section: 3 testimonial-style cards with placeholder quotes from personas (e.g. 'Sarah K., Amazon FBA Seller', 'David M., Auto Parts Importer', 'Lisa T., Fashion Boutique Owner'). Professional styling, not cheesy.
Implement Email Capture section: simple form with email input and 'Get Report Emailed' button (can be non-functional placeholder for now, just UI).
Implement the Calculator section: import and render the LandedCostReport component with an id='calculator' for the CTA scroll target.
Implement Related Tools section at the bottom: links to /import-duty, /shipping-cost-calculator, /currency with brief descriptions.

Add a card to the homepage (app/page.tsx) in the CALCULATOR_CATEGORIES array or as a standalone prominent card. Add it to the 'Business & Trade' category or create a new entry. The card should link to /for/logistics with text like 'Landed Cost Report' and desc 'Total import cost calculator'. Alternatively, add a standalone banner/card in the categories section that stands out.
acceptance_criteria: File app/for/logistics/page.tsx exists with proper Metadata export
Page has Hero, Problem Statement, How It Works, Feature Grid, Free vs Pro, Social Proof, Email Capture, Calculator, and Related Tools sections
Hero has dark background matching site aesthetic with emerald CTA
LandedCostReport component is rendered on the page
Free vs Pro section clearly communicates value of upgrading
Homepage (app/page.tsx) has a link to /for/logistics visible in the calculator categories or as a standalone card
npm run build succeeds without errors
